src: This is a real-world business use case, often tackled with data analysis, machine learning, and geospatial visualization. working on a store placement prediction project where the goal is to visualize and predict ideal locations for placing a new store, using a map generated on your system.
ja: データ分析・機械学習・地理空間可視化で取り組む実践的なビジネスユースケース。システム上で生成したマップを用いて新店舗の最適出店場所を可視化・予測する店舗配置予測プロジェクト
